result: If I could change the world in one way, it would be to instill a universal sense of empathy in every person. Empathy—the ability to truly understand and share the feelings of others—could break down so many barriers that divide humanity. It would foster compassion in conflicts, reduce prejudice, and drive collective action on issues like poverty, inequality, and environmental destruction. People would prioritize connection over competition, and decisions, whether personal or political, would be made with the well-being of others in mind. I believe this one shift in perspective could ripple out to address countless problems, creating a world that’s more just, kind, and sustainable.
